word: H934 - בֹּהֶרֶת - bôhereth - bo-heh'-reth - Bright spot

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּהרת

Transliteration: bôhereth

Phonetic: bo-heh'-reth

BDB Definition:

  1. white patch of skin, brightness, bright spot (on skin)
  2. (CLBL) bright spot, scar, blister, boil
    1. resulting from fire
    2. resulting from inflammation of the skin
    3. possible sign of leprosy

Origin: active participle of the same as H925

TWOT entry: 211a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
